title: Implement v2.5 workload-aware allocation metrics rollup
description: Extend metrics-snapshot so v2.5 governed allocation can expose allocation volume, review load, and claim pressure from allocation-plan, policy-evaluation-report, and resource-claim artifacts.
triage_notes: Extended metrics-snapshot with allocation-plan, policy-evaluation, resource-claim, approval-required allocation, and allocation-review-load metrics; verified via runtime tests and direct CLI execution.
